s3.bucket.cors.CfnAbout: Describes the cross-origin access configuration for objects in an Amazon S3 bucket. For more information, see [Enabling Cross-Origin Resource Sharing](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonS3/latest/dev/cors.html) in the *Amazon S3 User Guide*.

s3.bucket.cors.CorsRules.Description: A set of origins and methods (cross-origin access that you want to allow). You can add up to 100 rules to the configuration.
